title: oldenlandia multiflora
intro: Oldenlandia multiflora, also known as the Many-flowered Oldenlandia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is a tropical herb used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia multiflora include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia multiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
